title: RQD determination
aim: To determine the RQD (Rock Quality Designation) of a given rock core sample.
apparatus: Rock Core Sample, Core box/ Core Tray, Measuring Scale or steel tape
calculation:
total recovery length = 72.7+90.5+73.5+64+57.5=358.2cm
Total length of core = 500cm
RQD = (358.2/500)x100% = 71.64%
This lies in the Fair range from the reference table.
precautions: Consider pieces only greater than 10cm in length.
result: The RQD of the given rock sample is 71.64% and its Rock Quality is Fair .
